Name: Compulsion
Description:
Range: 4
Target: One character. If the target is an ally they must be willing
and the attack automatically Succeeds
Effect: Force the target to move up to half their Speed to any other space
of your choice within range  
Success: Force the target to move up to their full Speed instead  
Critical: If the target is an Enemy, deal $**2**^a$ **Stress**Overexert: If the attack Succeeds, the target is **Immobilized** until the end of their turn.
You may choose to use **Overexert** after the attack resolves.
Upgrade a: Add half your REA to the additional Stress you deal on a Critical
Upgrade b:
On a Critical, you may use the Overexert effect without taking Stress
in lieu of the normal Critical effect

Name: Addle
Description:
Range: 4
Target: One enemy
Success: The target is **Disoriented** and gains +**1**$^b$ **Slowed**
Overexert: Deal **2**$^a$ **Stress**
Upgrade a: Add half your REA to the additional Stress you deal when using Overexert
Upgrade b: Add half your FIN to the stacks of Slowed

Name: Puppet
Description:
Range: 4
Target: One character in range. If the target is an ally the attack automatically Succeeds.
Success: The target makes a **Basic Attack** against a valid target, resolved using your Mesmerism.  
Overexert: You may direct the target to use a different action you have access to
instead of a **Basic Attack**  
Critical: If the target is an enemy, deal **2**$^a$ **Stress**
Upgrade a: Add half your REA to the additional Stress you deal on a Critical against the second target
Upgrade b:
On a Critical against the first target, you may use the Overexert effect
without taking Stress. If you do, you do not get this ability's normal
Critical benefit against the second target

Name: The Prestige
Description:
Range: **1**$^b$
Trigger: You or an ally in Range are targeted by an enemy attack
Effect: If there is another character in Range that isn't the attacker, you may
swap places with them, causing the attack to target them instead of you
or vice versa. This might cause an ability that can normally only target
an enemy of the attacker to target their ally instead. If the new target
is an enemy, make a Mental Attack against them. If they Succeed this effect
fails but you may contest the triggering attack normally. After this effect
triggers, end this stance unless you take **Stress** to maintain it.
Upgrade a:
You may use the Effect even without an adjacent character, moving
1 space before the attack resolves. If this results in you being
out of range, the attack automatically Misses (you still take any
effects that don't require a Success)

Name: Mind Over Matter
Description:
Effect: If you would take **Fatigue**, you may choose to reduce the Fatigue
you take by up to **[1]** and take the same amount of **Stress** instead.
If you do, end this stance unless you take an additional **[1] Stress**
for each previous time you have used this effect since your last turn
Upgrade a: Increase the maximum amount of Fatigue you can convert to Stress by half your FOC
Upgrade b:
Reduce the total amount of additional Stress required each time you
maintain this stance by 1

Name: Composed
Description:
Effect: Increase your **Maximum Stress Tolerance** by **1**$^a$ and gain
a bonus on **Panic Rolls** of the same amount
Upgrade b: Apply the bonus to your **Resolve** rolls as well

Name: Disappearing Act
Description: Effect: Whenever you successfully defend against an enemy attack, become **Hidden**.
Upgrade a: In addition, gain **+1 Boon** on your next attack
Upgrade b:
After applying this effect the next attack against you before the start
of your turn has **+1 Bane**, and Hidden does not end before the start
of your turn unless you are Successfully attacked by an adjacent enemy
